title: Satellite images reveal massive oil spill near Kharg Island — ~45 sq km slick, largest since war began
snippet: Satellite imagery from Copernicus Sentinel-1/2/3 shows a grey-and-white oil slick covering ~45 sq km west of Kharg Island. Leon Moreland (Conflict and Environment Observatory) estimated ~80,000 barrels spilled since first detected Tuesday. Kharg Island handles 90% of Iran's oil exports. Cause unknown; no evidence of additional active spills as of May 8.
tag_reason: 이전 7일에 카르그 섬 유출 보도 없음. 전쟁 이후 최대 규모 환경 재난.
